title: The Economy, Plain and Simple
summary: This is a Bank of Canada educational hub page containing links to multiple short explainer articles on various economic topics spanning from December 2023 to September 2025. It is not a single archiveable document or macro catalyst event. Topics covered include payments innovation, business investment uncertainty, Canadian inflation, Indigenous economies, productivity, grocery prices, labour force participation, gasoline prices, and interest rate transmission.

No specific macro catalyst event or market structure data is contained in this page
The page functions as a navigation hub for Bank of Canada educational content
